title: What the changes are – Home office expenses for employees - Canada.ca
content:
Home office expenses for employees

## What the changes are
This page describes the recent changes to claiming work space in the home expenses.
Eligible employees who worked from home in 2023 or later tax years will be required to use the detailed method to claim home office expenses. The temporary flat rate method does not apply to the 2023 and later tax years.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
